title: Build Contact/Footer section with brand narrative, contact info, and social links
completion_summary: Contact section and enhanced footer created
acceptance_criteria: Contact section includes brand narrative, address placeholder, phone/email placeholders, and a contact form (no backend).
Footer includes copyright, social links using SVG icons (no emojis), and quick navigation links.
Form inputs have labels, focus states, and aria-describedby for errors.
Section background uses ivory/cream with near-black text and gold accent CTAs.
Footer is responsive and does not cause horizontal scroll on mobile.
All interactive elements have cursor-pointer and visible focus rings.
